# perimeter81_enhanced_region (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `harmony_sase_region_id` (String) The Check Point SASE region ID. Retrieve available IDs from the enhanced_regions data source.
- `network_id` (String) The ID of the enhanced network to add this region to.

### Optional

- `idle` (Boolean) Whether the region gateway is disabled for users. Defaults to true.
- `scale_units` (Number) The number of scale units for the region. Higher values provide greater throughput and connection capacity. Defaults to 1.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
